message:
feat(agentdb): Integrate RuvLLM for local LLM inference

Adds @ruvector/ruvllm as a first-class LLM provider in AgentDB:

- Add 'ruvllm' provider to LLMRouter (local, no API keys needed)
- SIMD-optimized CPU inference with SONA adaptive learning
- HNSW memory integration for context-aware responses
- FastGRNN routing for intelligent model selection
- 384/768/1024-dim embeddings support
- Zero cost, full privacy local inference
- Auto-fallback to RuvLLM when API providers fail

New LLMRouter methods:
- getEmbedding(text) - Get vector embeddings
- computeSimilarity(t1, t2) - Semantic similarity
- addToMemory(content) - Add to HNSW memory
- searchMemory(query, k) - Search memory
- getRuvLLMStats() - Engine statistics

Usage:
  const router = new LLMRouter({ embeddingDim: 384 });
  await router.initialize();
  const response = await router.generate('Hello', { provider: 'ruvllm' });

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
